channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Running the Full Agentic Deployment Pipeline: Scaffold to Live CloudFront
item.description: Running the Full Agentic Deployment Pipeline: Scaffold to Live CloudFront Phase 4 — Agentic Infrastructure: Building a Live AWS Deployment Pipeline with Claude Code Phases 1 through 3 built the...

item.title: Why Local-First Is the Future of Productivity
item.description: Every time you open your task manager, you're making a choice. Most people don't realize it — but choosing a cloud-first productivity tool means handing your most intimate professional data to a...

item.title: Tokens - the Language of AI
item.description: Hundreds of countries in the world, speaking thousands of languages - how can AI understand them all? Large Language Models (LLM's) - the brains of modern Artificial Intelligence (AI) - speak in...

item.title: [SC] Sendable
item.description: ¿Qué diferencia hay entre pasar valores entre hilos en GCD versus en Swift Concurrency? Igual que en GCD, en Swift Concurrency (SC) va a ser necesario pasar un dato de un hilo a otro. Sin embargo,...

item.title: Benjamin Netanyahu is struggling to prove he’s not an AI clone
item.description: Social media platforms are currently awash with conspiracy theories claiming that Benjamin Netanyahu has been killed or injured and replaced by AI-generated deepfakes. Between clips that...

item.title: Atomic Query Construction (AQC) Design Pattern: A Practical CRUD Implementation Guide
item.description: When I first introduced the Atomic Query Construction (AQC) design pattern, the focus was on breaking down monolithic repositories into small, single-purpose query classes. These classes are...

item.title: Canonry - The ultimate agent first AEO monitoring tool, open source.
item.description: When we starting doing AEO work, the tools available to us were limiting, proprietary and expensive. We needed something better. We built Canonry not only as a tool we could reliably use for...

item.title: Memories AI is building the visual memory layer for wearables and robotics
item.description: Memories.ai is building a large visual memory model that can index and retrieve video-recorded memories for physical AI.

item.title: Nvidia says China’s BYD and Geely will use its robotaxi platform
item.description: Nvidia added two leading Chinese automakers, BYD and Geely, to its robotaxi program, as the chipmaker seeks to put its stamp on the growing autonomous vehicle market worldwide. At its GTC...

item.title: I met Olaf — the Frozen robot who might be the future of Disney Parks
item.description: You know Olaf. Before KPop Demon Hunters, before the Wicked movies, it was Disney's Frozen that blasted show tunes like "Let It Go" and "Into the Unknown" into our lives. My little girls loved...

item.title: PII in Your Logs Is a GDPR Time Bomb - Here's How to Defuse It
item.description: Your application is probably logging PII right now. Not maliciously - it happens naturally. A user submits a form with their email. Your framework logs the full request body for debugging. The...

item.title: Beyond the Single Repo: How I Use Claude Code Across Microservices
item.description: As a backend engineer, I spend most of my time inside microservice architectures. And if you've worked in this world, you know the point: you're deep into one service and suddenly you need to...

item.title: How AST Made AI-Generated Functions Actually Reliable
item.description: When I stopped asking the AI to write code and started asking it to describe logic, everything changed — security, predictability, even multi-language support. I needed AI to generate small,...

item.title: The Physics of Quiet Ambition: What It Means to Defy Entropy
item.description: We live in an era of loud ambition. Social media feeds are saturated with highlight reels, income claims, and the relentless noise of "hustle culture." We are constantly told to grind harder,...

item.title: GlassWorm Attack Uses Stolen GitHub Tokens to Force-Push Malware Into Python Repos
item.description: The GlassWorm malware campaign is being used to fuel an ongoing attack that leverages the stolen GitHub tokens to inject malware into hundreds of Python repositories. "The attack targets Python...

item.title: Elon Musk’s xAI faces child porn lawsuit from minors Grok allegedly undressed
item.description: The three plaintiffs are seeking to represent anyone who had real images of them as a minor altered into sexual content by Grok.

item.title: Nvidia’s DLSS 5 uses generative AI to boost photorealism in video games, with ambitions beyond gaming
item.description: Nvidia’s new DLSS 5 uses generative AI and structured graphics data to make video games more realistic. CEO Jensen Huang says the approach could eventually spread to other industries.

item.title: Sony’s AI graphics upscaling for PS5 Pro games is getting a big update tonight
item.description: Sony's upgraded PlayStation Spectral Super Resolution (PSSR) technology is rolling out to several titles on the PS5 Pro, including Cyberpunk 2077, Final Fantasy VII Rebirth, Silent Hill 2, and...

item.title: How to watch Jensen Huang’s Nvidia GTC 2026 keynote — and what to expect
item.description: GTC is Nvidia's flagship annual event, where the chipmaker typically announces new products, partnerships, and its vision for the future of computing. Huang's keynote will focus on Nvidia's role...

item.title: Another deep tech chip startup becomes a unicorn: Frore hits $1.64B
item.description: At Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang's urging, Frore developed liquid-cooling tech for chips. That shift helped it raise $143 million.

item.title: Fuse raises $25M to disrupt aging loan origination systems used by US credit unions
item.description: The startup also announced a $5 million "rescue fund" to help credit unions ditch legacy software for its AI-native platform.

item.title: The dictionary sues OpenAI
item.description: Encyclopedia Britannica and Merriam-Webster say that OpenAI violated the copyright of almost 100,000 articles by using them for LLM training.

item.title: Where OpenAI’s technology could show up in Iran
item.description: This story originally appeared in The Algorithm, our weekly newsletter on AI. To get stories like this in your inbox first, sign up here. It’s been just over two weeks since OpenAI reached a...

item.title: Encyclopedia Britannica is suing OpenAI for allegedly ‘memorizing’ its content with ChatGPT
item.description: On Friday, Encyclopedia Britannica and dictionary publisher Merriam-Webster filed a lawsuit against OpenAI alleging that it used their copyrighted content to train its AI, then generated responses...

item.title: Amazon’s Fire TV Stick 4K Max and 4K Plus sticks are up to 50 percent off
item.description: Since Amazon rolled out its redesigned Fire TV OS, Amazon’s latest streaming sticks are even better than ever. And right now, both the Fire TV Stick 4K Max and Fire TV Stick 4K Plus are back at...

item.title: Amazon’s best Echo speakers and screens just got their biggest discounts
item.description: While Amazon’s previous lineup of Echo speakers and smart displays was boring, frankly, its late 2025 hardware refresh brought better hardware, improved performance, and Alexa Plus to several...

item.title: Yahoo CEO Jim Lanzone on reviving the web’s homepage
item.description: Today, I’m talking with Jim Lanzone, who is the CEO of Yahoo. It’s basically impossible to sum up the Yahoo story, but the short version of it is that a long time ago Yahoo paid Google to run the...

item.title: This chair gives half-worn clothes a home
item.description: Seating technology may have reached its peak for those of us who struggle to keep our lightly worn clothing piles away from furniture. The Laundry Chair - developed by YouTuber and viral inventor...

item.title: ⚡ Weekly Recap: Chrome 0-Days, Router Botnets, AWS Breach, Rogue AI Agents & More
item.description: Some weeks in security feel normal. Then you read a few tabs and get that immediate “ah, great, we’re doing this now” feeling. This week has that energy. Fresh messes, old problems getting...

item.title: Apple’s $549 AirPods Max 2 add better ANC and live translation
item.description: Apple has just announced the AirPods Max 2 with better noise cancellation and sound quality. The second generation of Apple's over-ear headphones starts at $549 and comes equipped with an H2 chip...
